creator: scheidell@FreeBSD.org
text:
needed to add the following to fcitx/pkg-plist:

(are they ALWAYS there, or just with certain OPTIONS?
do these dirs need dirrm or dirrmtry?

+lib/girepository-1.0/Fcitx-1.0.typelib
+share/gir-1.0/Fcitx-1.0.gir

+@dirrm lib/girepository-1.0
+@dirrm share/gir-1.0
+@unexec rm /etc/xdg/autostart/fcitx-autostart.desktop
+@unexec rmdir /etc/xdg/autostart 2>/dev/null || true
+@unexec rmdir /etc/xdg 2>/dev/null || true


-- 
Michael Scheidell, CTO
 >*| * SECNAP Network Security Corporation
